modelName: Mineral B Carbon Steel Frying Pan 28cm
description: This authentic De Buyer Mineral B 28cm frying pan is a premium French-made kitchen essential finished with protective organic beeswax. This specific variant features the iconic signature riveted handle with a comfortable ergonomic grip and the hallmark 'B' logo. Included in this package is the heavy-duty carbon steel pan itself, pre-treated to resist oxidation during transport. It is designed for high-heat searing and requires seasoning to develop a natural non-stick patina. This model is compatible with all hobs, including induction, making it a versatile choice for professional chefs.
features: Material: 99% Iron / Carbon Steel (mineral material). Gauge: 3mm thick skirt for uniform heat diffusion. Thermal Compatibility: High-temperature searing, grill, and oven safe (flash cooking only due to coated handle). Heat Source: All hobs including induction. Handle: Triple-riveted steel strip handle with ergonomic French curve.
uses: High-heat searing of steaks, caramelising vegetables, Maillard reaction development, grilling fish, crepe making, and omelettes (once seasoned).

accessories.name: Beeswax Finish
accessories.description: Protective organic coating (to be removed before first use).

name: De Buyer Mineral B Carbon Steel Frying Pan 28cm
